title: HEXA-WEAVE MVP W5 — sandbox attempt plan + dry-run verification + user approval gate
task_label: cycle 8 / fan-out 4/5 W5 sandbox plan (plan + dry-run only; no destructive ops)
scope: After W3 (clone+VRAM, 35.5 KB) and W4 (8-subdir+dryrun, 34.3 KB) specs were drafted in cycles 6-7 with implementation deferred pending user approval, cycle 8 fan-out 4/5 produces (a) 8-item user approval checklist with per-item cost+reversibility, (b) 6-item read-only dry-run verification, (c) 4 alternative GPU-free paths to advance F-TP5-b without burning GPU, (d) honest C3 disclosure that nothing destructive has been executed.

parent_witness.cycle_8_this: W5 plan + dry-run + user approval gate

dry_run_verification.method: read-only commands only; zero destructive ops

results.classification: PASS — matches W3 spec pin exactly

dry_run_verification.summary: 3 PASS / 3 GAP (D2+D3+D6 all environmental — Mac has no python3.10/CUDA/GPU; expected; redirects GPU work to ubu1 host per W3 spec topology)

approval_modes.B1_gpu_free: approve 1+2+4+7 only (no torch, no weights, no GPU); ~10 min

alternative_gpu_free_paths.title: GPU-free dataset prep (items 1+2+4+7)
alternative_gpu_free_paths.yield: env skeleton + reference codebase + test sequence

alternative_gpu_free_paths.title: mock-up architecture validation (CPU stubs)
alternative_gpu_free_paths.yield: full integration scaffold tested against mocks
alternative_gpu_free_paths.risk: mock signatures may diverge from real OpenFold at integration

alternative_gpu_free_paths.title: Lean4 ax2/mkbridge proof continuation
alternative_gpu_free_paths.yield: formal proof track parallel to GPU track

recommended_alt_sequencing: Alt-2 (10 min) → Alt-3 (2-4 hr) → Alt-4 (parallel) → THEN approve GPU items 3,5,6,8. Reduces risk of burning GPU on a misdesigned wrapper.

honest_disclosure_raw_91_C3.claim: This cycle produced 2 markdown documents + 1 witness JSON and ran 6 read-only shell commands. Nothing is installed, nothing is downloaded, no GPU has been touched.
caveats: python3.10 pin is brittle; ubu1 likely needs apt install python3.10 (additional sudo step not in checklist)
sm_120 deepspeed source build is bleeding-edge; W4 fallback row to sm_90 prebuilt exists; user should authorize fallback
GPU-week 0.001 estimate for Item 8 is optimistic; OOM-driven retries per W4 5-row fallback could push to 0.001-0.004
raw 86 cost-attribution coverage is incomplete: doc estimates compute+storage but not author-hours, external validation cost (Alt-1), or opportunity cost vs other 90d-gate work

falsifiers_raw_71.predicate: Within 7 days of user approval, all 8 items run but Item 8 forward pass fails with non-OOM error (SHA mismatch on weights, OpenFold API breakage, deepspeed/torch version conflict)
falsifiers_raw_71.detection: ubu1 error log; non-zero exit on Item 8; non-OOM trace
falsifiers_raw_71.trip_action: Revert to W4 5-row VRAM fallback; if fallback also fails, halt and re-spec the W3+W4 stack

falsifiers_raw_71.predicate: Within 14 days of approval, sm_120 deepspeed source build (Item 6) fails irrecoverably on ubu1
falsifiers_raw_71.detection: build log error during `pip install deepspeed --no-build-isolation` with TORCH_CUDA_ARCH_LIST=12.0
falsifiers_raw_71.trip_action: Switch to sm_90 prebuilt deepspeed wheel (W4 fallback); accept reduced perf vs Blackwell-native

falsifiers_raw_71.predicate: Within 30 days, RCSB removes 6L1U or changes FASTA endpoint format (D5 endpoint behavior changes)
falsifiers_raw_71.detection: D5 re-run returns non-200 or non-FASTA content-type
falsifiers_raw_71.trip_action: Switch to PDB FTP mirror (https://files.rcsb.org/fasta/) or local cache; update W3/W4 spec endpoint reference

falsifiers_raw_71.predicate: Within 7 days, OpenFold v2.2.0 tag is force-pushed and SHA e938c184 no longer resolves to that tag
falsifiers_raw_71.trip_action: Pin to commit SHA explicitly in clone (post-clone `git checkout e938c184`); update W3 spec to reference SHA not tag

falsifiers_raw_71.predicate: Within 14 days, user reports the 8-item checklist granularity is wrong (too coarse — e.g. wants Item 5 split into fetch/verify/load; OR too fine — e.g. wants 1+2+4+7 bundled as single approval)
falsifiers_raw_71.detection: user explicit feedback; reviewer comment; PR discussion
falsifiers_raw_71.trip_action: Re-issue companion approval doc with revised granularity; honor user's chunking preference; update witness JSON to match

verification.spec_chain_intact: W1 → W2 → W3 (35.5 KB) → W4 (34.3 KB) → W5 plan (this) — all docs present in proposals/
